text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, as we're walking through<n>the shopping
district on the way<n>home...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, that's loud...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with<n>our New
Year's raffle! This year's<n>grand prize is a hot
spring vacation<n>for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot<n>hamburger
steak! Second-prize<n>winners get a bushel of
carrots! And<n>third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you<n>by! Get a ticket
now and spin for your<n>chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I received a raffle ticket earlier when I<n>bought
something, which is perfect<n>because...
choice_data_list: We gotta give this a try, Taishin!
We gotta give this a try, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why don't you just do it yourself?<n>I'm gonna
head home.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Those things are always rigged so<n>you don't
actually win anything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That grand prize is nothing but a pipe<n>dream.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Oho! I see you've got your eyes on<n>the grand
prize, miss! That's the<n>spirit! Dream big or go
home!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I wasn't even—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh! Shut your piehole, dummy!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin spins the lever of the<n>raffle machine
with a somewhat<n>puckered expression.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the<n>tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves<n>a
grand-prize winner! Come and get<n>the coupon for
your hot spring<n>vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I actually won the hot spring trip?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, thanks...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin is so surprised that all<n>she can
manage is a genuine show<n>of gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Here. This belongs to you since it<n>was your raffle
ticket.
choice_data_list:
But you're the one who won the prize. You should
get to enjoy it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ah, so that's why you're asking<n>which of us
would like to join you on<n>a trip.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh, wow! A trip to a hot spring? I'dlove to—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now, hold on, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Bwah?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You really need to be more sensitive<n>to your
friends' feelings.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My apologies, Taishin. The two of us<n>will be busy
for the foreseeable<n>future, so I'm afraid we can't
go with<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's much to do after the Twinkle<n>Series as
well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Besides, I'm sure there's someone<n>who would
make a far more fitting<n>travel companion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: A what now? Who are you even<n>talking about?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Which would be more embarrassing<n>for you?
Having everyone spell it out<n>or having to figure it
out yourself?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I hate it when you do that, Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, do you? I love how awkward<n>you are,
though.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, Narita Taishin barges into my<n>office, rushes
up to me, and shoves<n>the vacation ticket into my
hands.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Shelve this.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I can't find anyone to go with me<n>by the
expiration date, then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Then nothing! Anyway!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Just shelve it for now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And that's how I end up holding onto<n>the ticket for
the hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize<n>winner!
Congratulations! You get one<n>deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Geez, it's enormous...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Right?! It's big enough to satisfy<n>even the
hungriest Umamusume! And<n>I know how much
you guys like to<n>eat!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (This is way too much for me...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: That night, while I'm working in my<n>office...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Good, you're here. You have dinner<n>yet?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? You better not tell me you<n>don't like
Bolognese.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pre-cooked hamburger steaks are<n>just ground
meat once you smash<n>them up... So, yeah.
choice_data_list: You made this with that carrot hamburger steak?!
You made this with that carrot hamburger steak?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Is that a crime?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The raffle ticket was yours, so you<n>should have a
share of this too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, hurry up and eat before it<n>goes cold.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I couldn't bring myself to cut the<n>hamburger
steak in half and share it<n>all chummy-like, but this...
This, I can<n>do.)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Together, we eat the special<n>Bolognese pasta that
Taishin made,<n>and it's absolutely delicious.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's<n>your lucky
day! You're going home<n>with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Holy crap, that's an insane amount of<n>carrots.
What the hell am I supposed<n>to do with all these?
Ugh... I guess there's only one thing I<n>can do.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoooaaa! I've never seen so many<n>carrots!

I can understand how it would've<n>been a struggle
for you two to finish<n>this alone.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Are we really allowed to<n>take as much
as we want?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but don't come crying to me if<n>you eat too
many and get sick.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! It's carrot party tiiiime!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Of course you aren't listening...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: In any case, I'll happily take some as<n>well.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is actually a lifesaver. I was<n>having trouble
thinking of side dishes<n>to include in Brian's lunch.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I only won them because I used my<n>trainer's
raffle ticket, so don't thank<n>me.
choice_data_list:
But you were the one who suggested that we
share them, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Taishin! I always knewyou were super nice at heart!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ughhh, stop that! I'm not nice at all!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You looking to get punted into the<n>sun?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With our lucky raffle prize, we hold a<n>delightful
carrot party together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won<n>third prize!
Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You heard 'em. Here.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin tosses the carrot at me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That came from your raffle ticket, so<n>it's yours.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, it's almost time for dinner,<n>so let's go
home and—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Grumble...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Can it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Not even! I'm not hungry, and I don't<n>want the
carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Gruuumble!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Urrrgh!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I offer the carrot to Narita Taishin<n>again, and she
snatches it from me<n>without a word.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you<n>pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of<n>tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Tissues...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's not like I care. It was your raffle<n>ticket.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Besides, it's not like we can't goto a hot spring without winning someticket at a raffle.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You being all sorry for me is what's<n>making this
awkward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Anyway, let's go home. You can<n>have the tissues.

Narita Taishin rushes off, but her<n>expression is
tinged with frustration<n>as she brushes past me.
